title: lindsaea repens var. macraeana
intro: Lindsaea repens var. macraeana, also known as the Australian tree fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Lindsaeaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Lindsaea repens var. macraeana is typically prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its leaves can also be used in poultices or as a topical application for skin issues.
